# netbox_vlan_group (Data Source)

Fetches a VLAN group from NetBox by name or slug.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the VLAN group to look up.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the VLAN group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the VLAN group.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the VLAN group.
